name: Sol
longDesc: Sol is a G-type main-sequence star and the centre of humanity's home system. At the turn of the 31st century, Sol remains the most densely populated system in human space, with billions of inhabitants spread across Earth, the terraformed Mars, orbital habitats, and colonies throughout the belt and outer planets. The inner system is a bustling crossroads of trade and politics, while the outer reaches from the gas giants to the distant scattered disc host frontier settlements, research outposts, and the quiet hum of deep-space industry.
comment: Converted from 00_sol_EXTENDED.lua for the JSON System Editor era.
